input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.5.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.5.5
            TITLE: the perimeter shear strength of the monocoque laminate must be 7.5 kn or more for a

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.5.5: The perimeter shear strength of the monocoque laminate must be 7.5 kN or more for a
F.7.5.5 The perimeter shear strength of the monocoque laminate must be 7.5 kN or more for a 
section with a diameter of 25 mm.  
This must be proven by physical test completed per F.4.3.5 and the results included in the SES.

final_answer: rule F.7.5.5: The perimeter shear strength of the monocoque laminate must be 7.5 kN or more for a F.7.5.5 The perimeter shear strength of the monocoque laminate must be 7.5 kN or more for a section with a diameter of 25 mm. This must be proven by physical test completed per F.4.3.5 and the results included in the SES.
